# Surp v1.1.3

This release completes the rename from `crous` to `surp` and publishes the
standard headerless format.

## Changed

- Renamed project references from `crous` to `surp` across source, packages,
  CLI, FFI, workflows, benchmarks, and documentation.
- Updated the repository remote target to `https://github.com/tubox-labs/surp.git`.
- Updated Python and native extension version metadata to `1.1.3`.

## Removed

- Removed the legacy standard binary header. The standard payload now
  starts directly with the block stream header.

## Python Migration

Install the renamed package:

```sh
pip install surp
```

The legacy `crous` Python package is retained only for version `1.1.3` and
emits this setup-time deprecation warning:

```py
# setup message
warnings.warn(
    "Package 'crous' has moved to 'surp'. Install with: pip install surp",
    DeprecationWarning
)
```

## Notes

- The release tag is `v1.1.3`.
- New package consumers should use `surp`; `crous` is only a migration shim.
